info.name: EduVerse API - Full Collection
info.description: EduVerse API - Full Collection with 32 module folders, 200+ requests. Covers Auth, Users, Campus, Departments, Programs, Semesters, Courses, Sections, Schedules, Enrollments, Assignments, Grades, Rubrics, Files, Attendance, Quizzes, Labs, Notifications, Messaging, Discussions, Announcements, Community, Schedule, Exams, Calendar, Integrations, Materials, Structure, User Profile & Preferences, Admin User Management, Admin Roles & Permissions, and Google Drive Integration.

request.description: List users with pagination. The /users/search route has a known route ordering issue, so use the list endpoint with filters instead.

item.name: 💬 Messaging
item.description: WhatsApp-like real-time messaging. Supports direct conversations, group chats, file attachments, read receipts, delete-for-me, delete-for-everyone, and search. WebSocket: connect to /messaging namespace with JWT token.

formdata.description: Video file to upload (mp4, avi, mov, webm, mkv)

formdata.value: This video covers the introduction to the course and basic concepts.

request.description:
Upload a video file to YouTube and create a course material record.

**Supported formats:** mp4, avi, mov, webm, mkv, flv, wmv

**Flow:**
1. Video is uploaded to YouTube (unlisted)
2. YouTube returns video ID
3. Material record created with embed URL and YouTube video ID

**Response includes:**
- `materialId`: Database ID
- `externalUrl`: YouTube embed URL
- `youtubeVideoId`: Original YouTube video ID
- `youtubeUrl`: Full YouTube watch URL
- `embedUrl`: Embed URL for iframe

**Note:** Requires YouTube API credentials configured in environment.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 201 or 400 (YouTube API required)', function () {

exec: pm.test("Pagination meta", () => { var m = pm.response.json().meta; pm.expect(m).to.have.property("total"); pm.expect(m).to.have.property("page"); pm.expect(m).to.have.property("limit"); pm.expect(m).to.have.property("totalPages"); });
